docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-23-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIRRANE, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY GLENNON, BARBARA DIRRANE, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLENNON, BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIRRANE, MICHAEL $6,008.63 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,138.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,008.63 FILED BY GLENNON, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT DIRRANE, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
